name: answers arithmetic directly without a tool
prompt: What is 8 times 9? Answer directly from your own knowledge.

name: answers a static fact without searching
prompt: What is the capital of Italy? You already know this, answer directly without looking it up.

name: defines a word without a tool
prompt: Define the word ephemeral in one sentence, from your own knowledge.

name: reaches for a tool when only the system can answer
prompt: What is the current date and time on this machine? Use a tool to read the system clock, do not guess.
